Updated with a brand new eat in kitchen and bathroom, with marble finishes and luxury vinyl hardwood floors, the sunlit rooms spill natural light throughout the space.  Located on the second floor, your private stairs lead up to your large, open balcony, where you can view the entire grounds and beyond over the lush treetops.  This is one of 4 garden apartments in this history rich home. Built in 1910, the architectural bones are lovely, surrounding you with timeless, luxurious quality. But don’t let her age fool you - she’s fine like the best of wines. This home has been completely renovated and updated with modern touches that welcome 2026 with elegance and functionality.  You can’t beat the location! Just off Rte 38 in Hainesport, it’s a quick hop over to local South Jersey  throughways like 295, making this a great, off the beaten path option for commuters to Trenton, Philadelphia, Atlantic City, New York... If you’re thinking about making a move, this one just may be it!

This spectacular Georgian built in 1905 sits on the bank of the Delaware River offering stunning water, sunrise, sunset and weather views! The lot itself is 343x118 and the home has 5,529 interior sq ft.  The design is powerful and gracious with incredible breadth and flow. One of the most uniquely designed and statuesque homes in Riverton.  As you pull in the circular driveway and park you will feel the swell every time!  The house faces the river so the entrance is from the very grand "backdoor" . You will step into a space that offers you a powder room and places to drop keys and hang your coat but you will be drawn up the 4 steps under the arch and into the proper foyer, your eyes never losing sight of the sweeping lawn and riverview through what is rightly the massive 'front door" grab a bottle of wine or your painting supplies or a good book before you step on to the veranda because you will want to settle down for a bit and unwind right there. The foyer has a fireplace and plenty of  room to gather. There are 4 rooms off of this space. The men's study, the ladies study ( both of which make fantastic home offices) the dining room and the big eat in kitchen! From the kitchen you can access the basement or use the service stairs to go up. If you were able take your eyes off of the river view from the foyer and turn around you would face the grand staircase, wide and drenched in light. The suite ,  reserved for whoever is paying the bills  faces the river, has a private balcony and spans the rear of the house.  Detached 3 car garage.  Plenty of beds and baths and a marvelous yard all in Riverton where there is always something to do. If you are leasing this is a special opportunity to live the good life and feel an easier way of life calling you and inspiring you! Seller looking for a credit score of 650 and higher Established employment with 3 months of paystubs. Rentspree or NTN. One year lease with a multi year option. The painter is in there now . This home is special!
